texto: I could have been on a path that led to different, more traditional teen romance, and 'Nip/Tuck' shook me loose from any generalization I might have been forced into. It helped me understand I wanted to take on things that were edgier, more challenging and riskier.
explicacao: Citação de Seth Gabel sobre temas ligados a amor. “I could have been on a path that led to different, more traditional teen romance, and 'Nip/Tuck' …” articula amor, path, me em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como me e understand.
